# 📌 Pull Request

## 🔎 Description
Provide a clear and concise description of what this PR does.

- What problem does it solve?
- What changes were made?

---

## 🧩 Type of Change
Please select the relevant option(s):

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔐 Security improvement

---

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes:

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Manual testing
- [ ] CI pipeline passed

Details:

---

## 🔐 Security Checklist (IMPORTANT)

Ensure the following:

- [ ] No hardcoded `staff_id`
- [ ] No printing/logging of `staff_id`
- [ ] No sensitive data exposed
- [ ] Confidentiality script passes

---

## 🧹 Code Quality Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project standards
- [ ] Linting (flake8) passes
- [ ] No unnecessary files included
- [ ] `.gitignore` rules respected

---

## 🔄 CI/CD Checklist

- [ ] All GitHub Actions checks passed
- [ ] Branch is up-to-date with `main`

---

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots or logs if your change affects output/UI.

---

## 🙋 Additional Notes

Anything else reviewers should know:
